zh.East Down, Devon, England: 英國戴文易亞斯特 唐
zh.lifeSummary: Honor Penfound是Edmond Penfound和Penfound的女兒，於1536年出生在英國可瓦爾布德。她於1554年7月10日與John Pyne在英國戴文易亞斯特 唐結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1574年5月20日在英國戴文易亞斯特 唐享年38歲，埋葬在英國戴文易亞斯特 唐。

zh-hans.East Down, Devon, England: 英国戴文易亞斯特 唐
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Honor Penfound是Edmond Penfound和Penfound的女儿，于1536年出生在英国可瓦爾布德。她于1554年7月10日与John Pyne在英国戴文易亞斯特 唐结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1574年5月20日在英国戴文易亞斯特 唐享年38岁，埋葬在英国戴文易亞斯特 唐。

nameMeanings.name: Penfound
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Cornish: locative name from Penfound in Poundstock (Cornwall). The place-name derives from Middle Cornish pen ‘head, top, end; promontory’, perhaps with * faw ‘beech trees’.

nameMeanings.name: Honor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Honour ;  the dominant spelling of both the vocabulary word and the given name in the United States today. This is now the more frequent spelling of the name in Britain also, used, for example, for the actress  Honor Blackman  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Honour
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the quality (via Old French, from Latin honor). The name was popular with the Puritans in the 17th century and has remained in modest use to the present day.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Honor Penfound was born in 1536, in Bude, Cornwall, England as the daughter of Edmond Penfound and Penfound. She married John Pyne on 10 July 1554, in East Down, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 20 May 1574, in East Down, Devon, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in East Down, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Honor Penfound est née en 1536, à Bude, Cornouailles, Angleterre, fille d’Edmond Penfound et Penfound. Elle a épousé John Pyne le 10 juillet 1554, à East Down, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 mai 1574, à East Down, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à East Down, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Honor Penfound wurde 1536 in Bude, Cornwall, England, als Tochter von Edmond Penfound und Penfound geboren. Sie hat am 10. Juli 1554 in East Down, Devon, England John Pyne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Mai 1574 im Alter von 38 Jahren in East Down, Devon, England und wurde in East Down, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Honor Penfound è nata il nel 1536 nel Bude, Cornwall, England come figlia di Edmond Penfound e Penfound. Lei sposato John Pyne il 10 luglio 1554, nel East Down, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 maggio 1574, nel East Down, Devon, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a East Down, Devon, England.

ja.Penfound Wood, Bude, Cornwall, England: イギリスコルンワルブド
ja.East Down, Devon, England: イギリスデボンエアスト ダウン
ja.lifeSummary: Honor Penfoundは1536年にイギリスコルンワルブドでEdmond PenfoundとPenfoundの娘として生まれた。1554年7月10日にイギリスデボンエアスト ダウンでJohn Pyneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1574年5月20日にイギリスデボンエアスト ダウンで38歳で死去し，イギリスデボンエアスト ダウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Honor Penfound(은)는 1536년 영국 코른월 부드에서 Edmond Penfound(와)과 Penfound의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1554년 7월 10일 영국 데폰 이스트 다운에서 John Pyne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1574년 5월 20일 영국 데폰 이스트 다운에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 이스트 다운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Honor Penfound nasceu em 1536, em Bude, Cornwall, Inglaterra filha de Edmond Penfound e Penfound. Ela casou-se com John Pyne em 10 de julho de 1554, em East Down, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de maio de 1574, em East Down, Devon, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em East Down, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Honor Penfound родилась в 1536 г. в местности буд, корнвалл, Англия. Её родителей звали Edmond Penfound и Penfound. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Pyne 10 июля 1554 г. в местности эаст доун, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 20 мая 1574 г. в местности эаст доун, девон, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности эаст доун, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Honor Penfound nació en 1536, en Bude, Cornwall, Inglaterra como hija de Edmond Penfound y Penfound. Se casó con John Pyne el 10 de julio de 1554, en East Down, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de mayo de 1574, en East Down, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en East Down, Devon, Inglaterra.
